description: CompositionDark and light grey striped polo neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has full sleeves with ribbed cuffs, ribbed collar in dark grey, buttoned chest placket, and embroidered leaping cat logo on the left sleeve FittingRegular Wash careMachine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergentDo not bleach or soakLine dry inside out in shadeWarm iron onlyDo not iron directly on print/embroidery Warm up and enjoy healthy sporting in style with this puma polo neck t-shirt. Made of pure cotton fabric, you are sure to stay fresh and comfortable all day, while the Jumping Cat logo enhances your fashion statement. Team this T-shirt with sportswear when on a fitness drive, and with jeans and sports shoes for a cool, casual look.Model statisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18.5"
